Master Data.subtitle: Core reference entities shared across all modules

entities.name: location
entities.desc: Physical sites, warehouses, and production areas

entities.name: customer
entities.desc: End customers — hospitals, distributors, group purchasing organisations

entities.name: supplier
entities.desc: External suppliers — components, services, subcontractors

entities.name: product
entities.desc: All SKUs — finished goods, subassemblies, components, raw materials

entities.name: employee
entities.desc: Internal staff — operators, engineers, managers, buyers

entities.name: exchange_rate
entities.desc: Daily exchange rates between currency pairs

entities.name: price_list
entities.desc: Named price lists — standard, customer-specific, promotional

entities.name: price_list_line
entities.desc: SKU-level price within a price list

entities.name: customer_price_list
entities.desc: Assignment of a price list to a specific customer

Engineering.subtitle: Product structure, routings, and production infrastructure

entities.name: bom_header
entities.desc: Bill of Materials — one active revision per finished good

entities.name: bom_line
entities.desc: Individual components within a BOM revision

entities.name: routing_header
entities.desc: Routing revision metadata per finished good

entities.name: routing_operation
entities.desc: Individual operations in a routing

entities.name: work_centre
entities.desc: Production work centres and quality stations

entities.name: shift_calendar
entities.desc: Planned capacity per work centre per shift per day

entities.name: equipment
entities.desc: Production equipment, test rigs, and quality instruments

entities.name: maintenance_log
entities.desc: Equipment maintenance and calibration activity records

Inventory.subtitle: Stock balances, lot traceability, serial numbers, and movements

entities.name: inventory_balance
entities.desc: Current stock level per SKU per location

entities.name: lot
entities.desc: Lot/batch master — every traceable quantity of material

entities.name: serial_number
entities.desc: Individual unit traceability for finished goods

entities.name: stock_movement
entities.desc: Immutable ledger of every stock transaction

columns.name: movement_type
columns.note: RECEIPT | WO_ISSUE | WO_RECEIPT | SHIPMENT | TRANSFER | QA_HOLD | QA_RELEASE | ADJUSTMENT | SCRAP

Procurement.subtitle: Supplier pricing, purchase orders, and receipts

entities.name: supplier_item
entities.desc: Price, lead time, and terms per supplier–SKU combination

entities.name: purchase_order
entities.desc: PO header — one order placed to one supplier on one date

entities.name: purchase_order_line
entities.desc: Individual line items on a purchase order

Planning.subtitle: Demand forecasting and master production scheduling

entities.name: sales_forecast
entities.desc: Monthly demand forecast per SKU

entities.name: mps_entry
entities.desc: Master Production Schedule — planned build quantities per SKU per period

columns.name: metric
columns.note: FORECAST_QTY | BACKLOG_CATCHUP | BEG_INV | TARGET_END_INV | UNCONSTRAINED_BUILD | LOT_SIZE | PLANNED_BUILD | END_INV

Production.subtitle: Work orders and step-level operation actuals

entities.name: work_order
entities.desc: Production order to build a quantity of a finished good

entities.name: work_order_operation
entities.desc: Step-level actuals per routing operation — source of OEE, yield loss, and labour efficiency data

Sales & Fulfilment.subtitle: Customer orders, shipments, invoicing, and returns

entities.name: sales_order
entities.desc: Customer order header

entities.name: sales_order_line
entities.desc: Individual line items on a sales order

entities.name: shipment
entities.desc: Physical dispatch event

entities.name: shipment_line
entities.desc: Line-level detail of what was physically shipped

entities.name: invoice
entities.desc: Customer invoice

entities.name: return_rma
entities.desc: Customer returns and RMA records

entities.name: qc_inspection
entities.desc: Quality inspection events — incoming, in-process, and final

entities.name: ncr
entities.desc: Non-Conformance Report

entities.name: capa
entities.desc: Corrective & Preventive Action — full lifecycle
